recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: A madly-in-love young couple's relationship begins to suffer when they struggle to conceive a child.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Dil To Pagal Hai
recommendations.overview: Rahul, the director of a successful dance troupe, considers Nisha his best friend, though secretly, she is madly in love with him. He then falls for Pooja, who is engaged to Ajay.

recommendations.title: Virgin Mountain
recommendations.overview: Fúsi finds comfort in the familiarity of his routines, until an involuntary dance class forces him to encounter the real world.

recommendations.title: Pretty Lethal
recommendations.overview: A troupe of ballerinas find themselves fighting for survival as they attempt to escape from a remote inn after their bus breaks down on the way to a dance competition.

recommendations.title: Max
recommendations.overview: Max is 6 years old. She lives with her dad Toni, a small time crook with a golden heart. For Xmas, Max offers him Rose, a call-girl found on the street whom she’s very fond of. Despite the complicated situation, Toni’s gonna have a hard time refusing

recommendations.title: The Mustang
recommendations.overview: While participating in a rehabilitation program training wild mustangs, a convict at first struggles to connect with the horses and his fellow inmates, but he learns to confront his violent past as he soothes an especially feisty horse.

recommendations.title: Feel the Beat
recommendations.overview: After failing to make it on Broadway, April returns to her hometown and reluctantly begins training a misfit group of young dancers for a competition.

recommendations.title: Death of a Superhero
recommendations.overview: A dying 15-year-old boy draws stories of an invincible superhero as he struggles with his mortality.

recommendations.title: StreetDance 3D
recommendations.overview: In order to win the Street Dance Championships, a dance crew is forced to work with ballet dancers from the Royal Dance School in exchange for rehearsal space.
